text.title: voice-ui Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the voice-ui methodology end-to-end.

step.name: author-dialogues
step.action: Write 3+ sample dialogues per intent. Capture natural wording.

step.name: extract-intents-slots
step.action: Derive intents + slots from dialogues. Reject intents without ≥3 utterance samples.

step.name: author-prompts
step.action: Write spoken prompts ≤12 words, grade 8 or below. Include barge-in markers.

step.name: error-ladder
step.action: For each intent, add rephrase prompt + examples prompt + fallback escalation.

step.name: confirmation-strategy
step.action: Add explicit confirmation for irreversible actions. Spec each Yes/Cancel pair.
step.decision-gate: Reject if any irreversible action lacks confirm.
